data.description:
## Why
`run_git` (`src/rebar/_store/gitutil.py:26-61`) is characterized only through callers that
monkeypatch it (`tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_git_adapter_characterization.py:48-57`);
the real wrapper's own branches are never exercised. Signature:
`run_git(cwd, *args, check=True, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=None, env=None,
input_data=None)`. VALIDATED.

## What
Add a focused test matrix that invokes the real `run_git`.

## Scope
- New `tests/unit/test_run_git_wrapper.py` (or similar).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `cwd=None` omits `-C`; a path-like `cwd` inserts `-C <cwd>`.
- [ ] `check=True` propagates `CalledProcessError`; `timeout` propagates `TimeoutExpired`.
- [ ] `env` replacement and `input_data` (stdin) forwarding are asserted.
- [ ] The `bytes` input + `text=True` combination is either rejected clearly or the type
      contract is narrowed; a test pins the chosen behavior.
- [ ] `make test` green.
data.title: Add a direct contract test matrix for the shared run_git wrapper
